en: I ate some. Hey, I kept...
I kept a scrapbook of your... Of your clippings and...
ja: 君の記事のスクラップブックを作ったんだ…
zhTW: 我做了一本你的剪報剪貼簿...
vi: Toi da lam mot cuon so cat dan bai bao cua ban...

en: Everything. There you are. This, I got you running.
zhTW: 這個，是你在跑步的照片。
vi: Day, toi chup ban dang chay.

en: I ran a long way. For a long time.
vi: Toi da chay mot quang duong dai...

en: Listen, Forrest. I don't know how to say this.
ko: 들어봐, 포레스트, 이걸 어떻게 말해야 할지 모르겠어.
ja: フォレスト、言い方が分からないんだけど。
zhTW: 聽著，阿甘，我不知道該怎麼說。
vi: Nghe nay, Forrest, toi khong biet phai noi the nao.

en: I just... I want to apologize for anything that I ever did to you.
ko: 내가 너에게 했던 모든 것에 대해 사과하고 싶어, 왜냐하면...
ja: 今まで君にしたことを全部謝りたい、なぜなら…
zhTW: 我想為我曾經對你做的任何事道歉，因為...
vi: Toi muon xin loi ve moi thu toi da lam voi ban, boi vi...

en: Because... I was messed up. For a long time.
This is my old friend from Alabama. How'd you do?
ja: こちらアラバマの旧友。
zhTW: 這是我從阿拉巴馬來的老朋友。
vi: Day la nguoi ban cu tu Alabama cua toi.

en: Next week, my schedule changes. No problem.
ko: 들어봐, 다음 주에 내 일정이 바뀌니까...
ja: 来週スケジュールが変わるから…でもありがとう。
zhTW: 聽著，下週我的行程會變，所以我可以...但謝謝。
vi: Nghe nay, tuan toi lich cua toi thay doi, nen toi co the... nhung cam on.
